name: Beans Rice Squash
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium vidalia (yellow) onion, diced and sautéed (caramelized)
3 slices acorn squash, cooked and diced small (1 cup or more)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat up kidney beans and mash them with their liquid.
2. Mix the spices and sundried tomato with sautéed onion, heating for 2 minutes.
3. Combine rice with mashed beans, adding the onion/tomato mixture, and simmer for 2 minutes.
4. Add diced acorn squash and cook until tender.
This dish has a robust appearance, tastes sweet, spicy, and slightly sour due to the sundried tomato. Capers can be added (1 tablespoon per cup) for a green, juicy note. The sundried tomato may not be ideal for this dish, as the flavor contrast is significant.
